calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lon Lazar appeared by zoom for and with Renard Williams (administrator).
Jonathan Huber appeared by zoom for Bridgette Carter.

No one is objecting to the petition. The court waives any notice issues. Mr. Lazar stated that he provided a revised order to request authority to retain a $10,000.00 reserve for final costs as the tax payments are being paid late and there will be penalties and interest. Mr. Huber asked if the court will be requiring a further accounting of that reserve. The court explained that it usually requires that an informal accounting of the reserve be provided to the parties. The Third Amended Petition to Approve Final Report of Personal Representative, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant with a minor adjustment to the order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: E. Melendez. Not reported.

Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lon Lazar appeared by zoom for Renard Williams (administrator).

The court stated that this is a fairly straightforward request, and that it kept this on for hearing to see if anyone wanted to come forward and express an opposing point of view. Mr. Lazar stated that there are a lot of moving parts, that there are a lot of different bank accounts that are associated with three estates that are intertwined, and that there was a typo in the dollar amount. Mr. Lazar also stated that he wants to be clear as to where the money sits and where it needs to go, and that he is happy to submit a revised proposed order to line everything up. The court noted that the examiner's suggestion is to authorize that the funds be placed in a blocked account at any financial institution. The court also stated that it will modify the proposed order and replace the zero with a nine. The Petition for Order Confirming Assets is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lon Lazar, via Zoom, for Renard Williams, Personal Representative.

Mr. Lazar reports of having deposited the net proceeds from the sale of the Estate's real property but the financial institutions have advised that they will not sign receipts. The court confirms with counsel that there are a total of four (4) accounts with two financial institutions and that counsel can file account statements that indicate the accounts are blocked. The court advises counsel to file the bank statements to confirm the blocked accounts as previously described and to file the closing statement.

The matter is continued to Dec-05-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lon Lazar appeared by zoom for and with Renard Williams by zoom.

The court stated that it understands the situation the parties are in and that it will do either limited authority with a $20,000.00 bond, or no authority with no bond. Mr. Lazar stated that they don't really need authority, that Mr. Williams is not in a position to take on a bond and that there is no necessity to open a blocked account. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition with no authority and no bond. A status hearing date on close of the estate will be indicated on the order.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
